action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Emerson, Snodgrass, Prado, Miresse, Subeck, Neubauer, Madison, Ortiz-Velez, Sinicki, Vining, Udell, Joers, Sheehan, Stroud, Johnson, DeSanto and Clancy; 
cosponsored by Senators Habush Sinykin, Keyeski, Pfaff, Roys, Hesselbein, Spreitzer, L. Johnson, Larson and Dassler-Alfheim
